channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: These are the keys for SF Giants to compete in the NL West in 2025
item.description: What needs to go right for the Giants to be competitive in the tight NL West and return to the playoffs for the first time since 2021?
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Lamont Butler has performed on Final Four stage before. He wants to get back there with a new school
item.description: Lamont Butler doesn’t want to settle for just one shining moment on a Final Four stage. The guy who made the buzzer beater to send San Diego State to the 2023 NCAA Tournament championship game is confident he can get back there as a fifth-year senior with Kentucky.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Blues post 7 consecutive wins in a push to make the playoffs after a two-year absence
item.description: ST. LOUIS (AP) — The wins just keep on coming for the St. Louis Blues, and their seven-game streak has significantly improved their chances of returning to the playoffs after a two-year absence.
item.dc:creator: WARREN MAYES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bucks star Damian Lillard's status for playoffs in question after blood clot diagnosis
item.description: Damian Lillard is out indefinitely after being diagnosed with a blood clot in his calf, the Milwaukee Bucks announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bucks say Damian Lillard has deep vein thrombosis in his right calf
item.description: Milwaukee Bucks guard Damian Lillard will likely be sidelined indefinitely, with the team announcing Tuesday night that he has deep vein thrombosis in his right calf and is taking blood-thinning medication.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Jasmine Crockett dismisses Americans impacted by trans athletes in women's and girls' sports
item.description: Rep. Jasmine Crockett addressed the impact of the trans athlete debate on the Democratic Party and suggested the issue is a distraction that divided the party.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mystery over Brett Gardner's son cause of death in Costa Rica deepens: report
item.description: Costa Rican officials are now reportedly eyeing food poisoning as the cause of Miller Gardner's death; Miller was the 14-year-old son of former Yankee, Brett.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Power conferences box out 'Cinderella' for the first time
item.description: The Sweet 16, a popular destination for bracket-busting mid-majors, will be made up entirely of teams from power conferences, a first since the bracket expanded to 64 teams in 1985.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU fans celebrate Sweet 16 bid with Cougars
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Hours after BYU pulled out a 91-89 thriller over Wisconsin to advance to its first Sweet 16 since 2011, hundred of diehard BYU fans showed up at Provo Airport at 1:30 in the morning to welcome the conquering heroes back from Denver. "What a game!" said one BYU fan.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Figure skating's world championships are headed to Boston, another chance to heal after DC crash
item.description: It has been nearly two months since American Airlines Flight 5342 lifted off from a wintry runway in southeast Kansas, destined for Washington, D.C., with dozens of members of the tight-knit figure skating community aboard it.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU headed to Sweet 16 after 91-89 win over Wisconsin
item.description: DENVER (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time in 14 years, the BYU basketball team is headed to the Sweet 16. Richie Saunders scored 25 points, while Trevin Knell added 14, as the Cougars held off a ferocious late run by Wisconsin to hold on for a 91-89 victory at Ball Arena in Denver.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Real Salt Lake shut out by FC Dallas, 1-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (AP) - Luciano Acosta scored the match's lone goal deep into first-half stoppage time to lift FC Dallas to a 1-0 win over Real Salt Lake on Saturday in a Western Conference match in Sandy, Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: LeBron James' return from injury spoiled by Bulls' phenomenal effort in 146-115 win over Lakers
item.description: Coby White scored 36 points, Josh Giddey flirted with a quadruple-double and the Chicago Bulls wrecked LeBron James' return from injury with an impressive 146-115 victory over the Los Angeles Lakers on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: In March Madness, BYU gets a stop, then gets to go ... to Sweet 16 with 91-89 win over Wisconsin
item.description: The BYU Cougars led the entire game Saturday but still had to make one, final defensive stop against Wisconsin's irrepressible guard, John Tonje, to seal a 91-89 victory over the Badgers and the program's first trip to the Sweet 16 since 2011 — the days of Jimmer Fredette.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: McNeese's Will Wade signs a 6-year deal to become NC State coach, AP source says
item.description: McNeese coach Will Wade has a signed six-year deal to take over as N.C. State's next coach, a person with knowledge of the situation told The Associated Press on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Boxing great George Foreman passes away
item.description: (KRON) -- Boxing legend, heavyweight champion and grilling entrepreneur George Foreman has passed away, his family announced in an Instagram post on Friday. Our hearts are broken. With profound sorrow, we announce the passing of our beloved George Edward Foreman Sr.
item.dc:creator: Tor Smith, KRON4

item.title: BYU shuts down VCU in NCAA Tournament, 80-71
item.description: DENVER (ABC4 Sports) - The last time BYU played in the NCAA Tournament in Denver in 2011, they made it to the Sweet 16. The Cougars are now one win away from going back.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU has the advantage against VCU in Big Dance
item.description: DENVER (ABC4 Sports) - As the BYU basketball team gets ready to take on VCU in the NCAA Tournament Thursday, the Cougars seem to have all the advantages over the Rams. With Denver being 5,280 feet above sea level, the Cougars won't be affected at all.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
